data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for time tracking by project phase and deliverable.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific need for time tracking by project phase and deliverable. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that directly address this requirement. The only related evidence pertains to general functionality without confirming the specific need for time tracking, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of time tracking by project phase and deliverable being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for time tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify time tracking by project phase and deliverable.
